title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Whirlpool India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Whirlpool India
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!
